data.title: The Secret To Dogecoin’s Rising Bullish Optimism Is…
data.description:
As the crypto prices continue to swing to the market’s changing tune, Dogecoin price has been showing some signs of seller exhaustion. Recent data suggest that bullish optimism is making a comeback.

data.title: Research Reveals How Record Treasury Supply Could Impact Crypto Market and Global Finance
data.description:
TL;DR The U. S. Treasury plans to issue $31 trillion in debt during 2025, which could divert capital from the crypto market toward traditional assets. Higher yields on short-term bonds may reduce the appeal of cryptocurrencies as a high-risk investment option. Treasury debt tokenization has reached $5. 9 billion, opening new avenues for crypto projects to earn. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/research-reveals-how-record-treasury-supply-could-impact-crypto-market-and-global-finance/

data.title: Dogecoin Charts Flash 2020-Style Bull Signal, Crypto Analyst Says
data.description:
The Dogecoin weekly chart is beginning to look eerily familiar. Crypto analyst Cantonese Cat, posting under the handle @cantonmeow, has published a three‑pane composite that reprises the technical cocktail seen just before the memecoin’s 2020/2021 melt‑up. The graphic, released Friday on X, lays out Dogecoin’s price action, a Global M2 Liquidity Index and the WaveTrend/Weighted Trend Oscillator (WTO). Each metric is flashing almost the same alignment that existed in late 2020—weeks before DOGE accelerated from fractions of a cent to an all‑time high of $0
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-charts-flash-2020-style-bull-signal-crypto-analyst-says/

data.title: OM CEO: Details of the destruction plan will be announced soon, and the buyback is still in progress
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The CEO of the OM project said that the specific details of the token destruction plan have entered the final preparation stage and are expected to be officially announced in the near future. At the same time, its repurchase plan is still progressing steadily. The team emphasized that it will continue to provide round-the-clock support to the Sherpas and OMies communities, and is committed to enhancing community confidence and the long-term value of tokens.

data.title: KiloEx recovers stolen funds after cyber attack, awards 10% bounty to white-hat hacker
data.description:
19-4-2025 – KiloEx, the perpetual futures decentralised exchange, has announced the complete recovery of funds nicked during this week’s sophisticated cyber attack. The platform has pledged a generous 10% bounty to the white-hat hacker who proved instrumental in retrieving the stolen assets. The successful recovery stands in stark contrast to the grim landscape of cryptocurrency [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/kiloex-recovers-stolen-funds-after-cyber-attack-awards-10-bounty-to-white-hat-hacker/
